[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100111001 6
1 1100101111 7
2 1011101111 8
3 1110100010 5
4 0010110001 4

6 1010010000 3
7 1101111111 9
